boundaries.trigger: Any KRN bootstrap target write outside runtime evidence.
boundaries.required_consumer: krn init --apply <capability> with approved proposal review decision
boundaries.rollback_or_kill: Remove the target and promotion record if the exact reviewed payload cannot be reproduced.

boundaries.trigger: Any attempt to store authoritative memory bodies in docs/memory/** or .krn/**.
boundaries.required_consumer: KRN MemoryStore adapter selected through KRN_MEMORY_STORE_PATH
boundaries.rollback_or_kill: Move durable memory body to a reviewed store-backed record or delete the repo-local copy.

boundaries.trigger: Any source claim promoted from candidate status to reusable project guidance.
boundaries.required_consumer: krn sources check and reviewed source graph update
boundaries.rollback_or_kill: Downgrade the source to unverified or quarantine conflicting lineage until source graph passes.

boundaries.trigger: Any command that changes files, external services, permissions, or network state.
boundaries.required_consumer: pre-edit engineering gate plus command-specific verification evidence
boundaries.rollback_or_kill: Stop the slice if verification cannot prove the command stayed within scope.

boundaries.trigger: Any dashboard, benchmark, broad API, cloud sync, or live-full expansion before a typed consumed behavior exists.
boundaries.rollback_or_kill: Park the surface as a later decision until a consumed product object exists.

overclaim_boundary: This seed defines local policy boundary IDs and approval rules only; it does not prove hook enforcement, security quality, broad API readiness, dashboard usefulness, or productivity lift.
